# Fixture mcp-servers.txt — exercises every parse/render branch.
# Comment line above, blank line below.

plainsrv http https://plain.example/mcp
ghsrv http https://gh.example/mcp auth=gh
gcsrv http https://gc.example/mcp auth=gcloud
c7srv http https://c7.example/mcp auth=context7
tavsrv http https://tav.example/mcp auth=tavily
exasrv http https://exa.example/mcp auth=exa
hfsrv http https://hf.example/mcp auth=hf
urlkey http https://key.example/{FIXTURE_KEY}/v2/mcp
misskey http https://key.example/{FIXTURE_MISSING}/v2/mcp
oauthsrv http https://oauth.example/mcp --client-id claude-oauth-id --codex-client-id codex-oauth-id
mystery http https://mystery.example/mcp auth=doesnotexist
tool stdio cmd: uvx some-tool --flag val
bare stdio cmd: solobinary
